name: Anemesis
author: Lime

placementContext.reason: Anemesis delivers a brutal combination of extreme wave precision, tight ship corridors, and unrelenting timing-based gameplay that maintains high intensity throughout. The level's complex structure with minimal consistency breaks and demanding accuracy requirements establishes it as a definitive Top 1 contender that pushes beyond current extreme demon standards.

description: Anemesis features intense, precision-based gameplay with demanding wave sections, tight ship timings, and complex dual segments. The level maintains a high difficulty curve throughout with minimal breaks, combining fast-paced mechanics with unforgiving accuracy requirements that create a relentless and challenging experience for even the most skilled players.
